code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut seen = "\n"
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut start = 0 - 1
while i < n
  mut is_ws = false
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(bv)
    if bv == 32 or bv == 9 or bv == 10 or bv == 13
      is_ws = true
    end
  when None
    is_ws = false
  end
  if is_ws
    if start >= 0
      let t = string.substring(input, start, i)
      let marker = "\n#{t}\n"
      if not string.contains(seen, marker)
        seen = "#{seen}#{t}\n"
        count = count + 1
      end
      start = 0 - 1
    end
  else
    if start < 0
      start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start >= 0
  let t = string.substring(input, start, n)
  let marker = "\n#{t}\n"
  if not string.contains(seen, marker)
    seen = "#{seen}#{t}\n"
    count = count + 1
  end
end
println("unique=#{count}")
